user_story: As a KVB partner-product user, I want to authenticate via the AD login endpoint with my username and password so that I receive session cookies and my branch/role context. login_type must always be 'AD'.

api_spec.description: KVB AD login. Returns auth cookies on success; 400 on invalid credentials or malformed input.

validation_rules.rule: login_type must be exactly 'AD'; any other value is rejected at the gateway.
username and userpassword are both mandatory; missing either returns 400.
